title: Disposable Towels Compact Compressed Biodegradable and Unscented - 12 Pack
description:
These Disposable Biodegradable Towels have many uses that can be taken advantage of while at home, camping, or working on a messy project. Have a few of them around the house, in the car, and during trips so you can have optimum cleanliness anywhere you go! At a compressed size of 0.5" x 0.75" you will hardly notice having a few of these around in your glove box, purse, desk drawer, or pretty much anywhere. As soon as you add water, the towel will expand into 9.5" x 10" of cleaning power! Because each towel is individually wrapped, you won't have to worry about the towels expanding until you're ready to use them. These can be used for ultimate clean face washing, wiping up spills, or any messy indoor or outdoor projects

Disposable Towels Compact Compressed Biodegradable and Unscented - 12 Pack

These Disposable Biodegradable Towels have many uses that can be taken advantage of while at home, camping, or working on a messy project. Have a few of them around the house, in the car, and during trips so you can have optimum cleanliness anywhere you go!

Key Features

  • Disposable Compact White Towels in 12 Pack
  • Compact Dimensions: 0.5" x 0.75"

Product Specifications

  • UPC: 821882469781
  • Color: White
  • Size: Small

At a compressed size of 0.5" x 0.75" you will hardly notice having a few of these around in your glove box, purse, desk drawer, or pretty much anywhere. As soon as you add water, the towel will expand into 9.5" x 10" of cleaning power! Because each towel is individually wrapped, you won't have to worry about the towels expanding until you're ready to use them. These can be used for ultimate clean face washing, wiping up spills, or any messy indoor or outdoor projects. These towels are made of 100% Rayon and are both biodegradable and environmentally safe.

You won't be unprepared when a messy situation arises with these 12 Pack Disposable Compact Towels!
